name: TopNav
description: Horizontal main navigation bar with heading, start, center, and end areas. API mirrors industry convention (Astryx TopNav); hover menus and mega-menus are behavior-layer boundaries.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible label for the navigation landmark.

slots.description: Logo or brand at the start edge.
Primary navigation items after the heading.
Search, icons, user profile at the end edge.
